# tag: recipe

total: 3

## #46928
- added: 2023-09-29 13:55:55

Piaja, rasuna, ada, lanka both, dalchini, star fula. Labanga, gol maricha, jeera, ilaichi, tomato 2ta\n\nGrind those \n\nPiaja small pices \n\nAlu fry\n\nMutton marination: dahi, haladi, luna, sorisa tela, masa 25%\n\nPiaja fry till brown\n\nKasa masala\nAdd mutton masala salt, haldi\n\nAdd Mutton no water in low flame\nAfter some time \nAdd alu\n\nAdd little water \n\nAt last some mutton masala and dhania patra
